revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Verify quote/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Verify quote/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Verify quote/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Verify quote/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Verify quote/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Verify quote/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[id:Verify source]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[id:Verify source]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[id:Verify source]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[id:Verify source]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[id:Verify source]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[id:Verify source]] }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|vq}} The {{Tl|Verify quote}} template will automatically place tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification]]. == Usage == '''{{tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}''' Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source. This is most often needed when: * The quotation is misformatted, ungrammatical, or has other problems that suggest it was not properly transcribed from the original. * The quotation may have been edited down or taken out of context to [[WP:NOR|imply something the original author/speaker did not actually mean]] * The quotation looks like it may have been entirely falsified. If the quotation does seem reliable, but simply lacks proper citations, then use {{Tl|Cite quote}} instead. In general, add the {{tl|Verify quote}} template only after a good faith attempt to verify the quotation has already been made. If the article has broader sourcing problems, a banner template like {{Tl|More citations needed}} may be more appropriate. Regarding unsourced or poorly sourced information: # If it is '''doubtful''' but '''unlikely to be harmful''' to the whole article, use a template like this to ask for source verification. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''', move the information to the talk page and ask for a source. # If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''doubtful''' and '''potentially harmful''' with regard to a [[WP:BLP|living person]], remove the information immediately, without the need of moving it to the talk page first. # If it is '''not doubtful''', use {{tl|Cite quote}} (or {{Tl|Citation needed}} for non-quotation material) to request a citation to improve the article's [[WP:V|verifiability]]. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AVerify_quote What links here]. For more articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Self-references to avoid|self-reference]], as it is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content and it should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. === Parameters === * {{Para|date}} You may append a date to the template in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} * {{Para|type}} You may add a type, such as "paraphrase" or "transliteration" in the following format: :{{Tlx|Verify quote|type{{=}}paraphrase}} becomes [''verify paraphrase'']. * {{Para|text}} The hover text of the tag can be changed with this parameter. :{{Tlx|Verify quote|text{{=}}Desired text to display on hover}} { "params": { "type": { "description": "A string to append to the tag. For example, \"paraphrase\". This renders as \"[verify paraphrase]\".", "type": "string" }, "text": { "description": "Text that appears in a tooltip when hovering the mouse cursor over the tag.", "type": "string" }, "date": { "description": "The date this tag was added. Format should be: [MONTHNAME] [YEAR]", "example": "June 2016", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "Use this inline template tag to label an ostensibly sourced quotation, to request verification with the original source.", "format": "inline" } == Related redirects == ''(These all redirect to Template:Verify quote)'' #{{Tl|Vq}} #{{Tl|VQ}} #{{Tl|Verify quotation}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Quotations]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|Quote]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates|Verify]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] {{wikidata link||id|Verify source}}
